action.reasoning: Observation: Fresh start, no code yet. Analysis: Need to build a 3D GNN model for HOMO-LUMO gap prediction. Best approach is to use a geometric DL model like SchNet or PaiNN on 3D coordinates. Decision: First explore data, then build a quick SchNet baseline with few epochs to get a baseline score and measure iteration time.
